revision.text: {{Progress box|Clean-up categories|count=subcats}} <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] </noinclude>
{{Progress box|Clean-up categories|count=subcats}} <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] </noinclude>
{{Progress box|Clean-up categories|count=subcats}} <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{Progress box|Clean-up categories|count=subcats}} <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Clean-up_categories_progress here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Clean-up_categories_progress for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Progress box|Clean-up categories|count=subcats}} <noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] }}</noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
